title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: KLAMATH COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services, in-home supports or residential placement, employment and vocational services, abuse investigation, and protective services. 565 Century Court Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 885-2435 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 885-2435 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to book an intake appointment. An eligibility specialist can help with the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Proof of citizenship and Oregon residency -Proof of address -Any records of psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH COUNTY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES SERVICES
